common.ministry: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances & Pensions

hero.slide1_desc: Real-time tracking, intelligent classification, and faster redressal. Providing a transparent interface for every citizen.

actions.lodge_desc: Submit your complaint with AI assistance
actions.status_desc: Check the progress of your grievance
actions.appeal_desc: Escalate if not satisfied with resolution

about.title: About THE SYSTEM
about.p1: The AI-Powered Public Grievance Redressal System is an advanced platform designed to enhance the efficiency of citizen engagement with the government.
about.p2: Built using cutting-edge Artificial Intelligence, the system automatically categorizes grievances, identifies urgent matters, and routes them to the appropriate department with minimal delay.
about.p3: Our goal is to ensure 100% transparency and provide timely justice to every citizen's concern.
